title: ligusticum lyallii
intro: Ligusticum lyallii, also known as Kava-Kava of the mountains, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand, belonging to the carrot family Apiaceae. Its roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ligusticum lyallii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating pain. Traditionally, the roots of this plant are prepared as a tea or tincture, and are also used in modern herbal preparations to promote relaxation and well-being.
